reasoning: The analysis of the FRED dataset (DPSACBW027SBOG) up to the forecast date shows a very consistent upward trajectory in the seasonally adjusted deposits for all commercial banks. While there was a slight dip around late October 2025 (dropping to ~18427), the overall metric continuously grew, reaching ~18535 by late November 2025 and accelerating to ~18655 by late January 2026. Consequently, for each subsequent resolution date, the value exceeds the October 26 baseline. As dictated by the forecasting rules, certainty strictly decreases (probabilities move closer to 0.5) as the horizon extends further into the future from the base date.
